title: Shantam Paapam
subTitle: A compilation of crime stories that depict the gripping real life incidents and sheds light on the victim's battle for justice.

title: Sri Gandhada Gudi
subTitle: Chandana marries into a family with a troubled past in order to escape her fate. However, can she restore the family's hope?

title: Muddu Sose
subTitle: Vidya's dream of becoming a doctor is threatened when her father decides to get her married. Unfortunately, her father-in-law also believes that women should not pursue education.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Karthikeya resolves not to part ways with his mother at any cost. Meanwhile, Karthikeya's mother implores him to embrace Lord Shiva and Parvati as his true parents and encourages him to visit Kailasa.

title: Shantam Paapam
subTitle: Swathi, a woman working at a massage parlour, meets Nagesh and they fall in love. However, he is unaware of her place of employment.

title: Prema Kavya
subTitle: Two sisters, Prema and Kavya, are pushed into marriages they don't want. However, they struggle with love and lies as they seek happiness in their relationships.

subTitle: A delivery boy, who is burdened with family responsibilities, gets into a contract marriage with Jhansi, a rich woman who despises men.

title: Pavada Purusha
subTitle: The villagers fear that Balu is dead as he continues to lie unconscious inside the temple. An emotional Goda Mavshi goes to inform Balu's family about this sad news. Has Balu really left this world? How will Balu's family react to it?

title: Pavada Purusha
subTitle: Sundara is left devastated and cries profusely at the sight of Balu's dead body. She refuses to accept her son's demise and continues talking to his dead body. Will Sundara be able to cope up with Balu's untimely demise?

title: Priyanka
subTitle: Priyanka is a 2016 Indian Kannada language thriller film written and directed by Dinesh Babu and produced by A. Mohan.Based on a real life incident occurred in Bengaluru, the film stars Priyanka Upendra and Tejas in the lead roles.Prakash Raj plays a special role of an investigator in the film. The music is composed by Krupakar and cinematography is by the director, Babu.
